---
name: Game Profile Request
about: Request support for a new game
title: '[GAME] '
labels: enhancement, game-profile
assignees: ''
---

## Game details
- **Game name**: 
- **Store**: Steam / GOG / Other
- **AppID** (if Steam): 

## Known issues on Linux
What breaks without fixes? (e.g. crashes, missing DLLs, script extender issues)

## Known fixes
If you know the fix, share it! (Proton env vars, winetricks components, etc.)

## Script extender / mod tools
- Does it use a script extender? (SKSE, F4SE, etc.)
- Any companion mod tools? (xEdit variant, BodySlide, etc.)

## Native plugin
Is there an existing `libgame_*.so` plugin for MO2?
